positive: Minimalist celestial forest landscape. A vibrant grouping of bioluminescent flora and stylized, geometric trees emerging from a deep sapphire night sky. The foreground features clean, symmetrical silhouetted jungle elements, intertwined with glowing constellations and soft, ethereal nebulae in pastel gradients (mint, lavender, soft gold). Composition must be highly centered and contained, designed as a repeat pattern or single striking emblem. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets modern line art, high contrast, crisp digital illustration, flat vectors with volumetric glow accents. Lighting: Soft rim lighting emphasizing the outlines of the plants and stars. Color Palette: Deep midnight blues and purples contrasted sharply with luminous teal and gold accents. Print quality, high resolution, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: photorealism, blurry, artifacts, watermarks, signature, text, messy, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, dirty, grunge, messy, random, bokeh, gradient shading, grayscale
